chapter_title.en: The Seventeenth Assembly, which is Friday, the Middle of the Month of Ramadan, 367 AH.

text: 5 - قال: وقال الرضا (عليه السلام) في قول الله عزوجل: (إن أحسنتم أحسنتم لانفسكم وإن أسأتم فلها) (3) رب يغفر لها (4).

en.bilal-muhammad: He said: Al-Rida (as) said, regarding the saying of Allah, “If you do good, you do good for yourselves; and if you do evil, [you do it against] yourself.” [17:7] [There is a] Lord that could forgive it.
